description: An impressionist landscape depicting a flooded village street. Murky brown floodwaters cover the road, with a small boat moored at left near a wooden structure. Bare-branched trees line both sides of the street, their trunks reflected in the water. Buildings with pale facades and reddish roofs extend along the right side. Figures walk along elevated paths near the buildings. The sky is grey and overcast, and the overall palette is muted with greys, browns, and pale blues.
